zh.lifeSummary: 當Uta von Passau於1085年9月2日出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 帕斯奧盧斯托福 安 德 羅特素爾茲巴賀時，她的父親Ulrich Graf von Passau und Finningen41歲，母親Adelheid von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen35歲。她和Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1150年2月9日在瑞士阿高斯昂享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Passau
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, Dutch, and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Nassau, formerly the seat of an independent duchy. The placename derives from Old High German naz ‘damp, wet’ + ouwa ‘water meadow’.

History: The royal house of Nassau traces its descent from Dudo, Count of Lauenburg, who flourished between 1093 and 1117. His family acquired the county of Nassau in the 12th century. Prince Willem van Oranje-Nassau, otherwise known as William the Silent (1533–84), was the leader of the Dutch revolt against Spain in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Uta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Uta von Passau was born on 2 September 1085, in Sulzbach, Ruhstorf an der Rott, Passau, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Ulrich Graf von Passau und Finningen, was 41 and her mother, Adelheid von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen, was 35. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten. She died on 9 February 1150, in Seon, Aargau, Switzerland, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Uta von Passau est née le 2 septembre 1085, à Sulzbach, Ruhstorf an der Rott, Landkreis Passau, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Ulrich Graf von Passau und Finningen, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten. Elle est décédée le 9 février 1150, à Seon, Argovie, Suisse, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.Sulzbach, Ruhstorf an der Rott, Landkrei: Sulzbach, Ruhstorf an der Rott, Landkreis Passau, Bayern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Uta von Passau am 2. September 1085 in Sulzbach, Ruhstorf an der Rott, Landkreis Passau, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ulrich Graf von Passau und Finningen 41 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen 35. Sie hatte mit Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Februar 1150 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Seon, Aargau, Schweiz.

Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten. Morì il 9 febbraio 1150, nel Seon, Argovia, Svizzera, all'età di 64 anni.

ko.Sulzbach, Ruhstorf an der Rott, Landkrei: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 파소 루h스토르프 앤 데르 로트 설즈바치
ko.lifeSummary: Uta von Passau(이)가 1085년 9월 2일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 파소 루h스토르프 앤 데르 로트 설즈바치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ulrich Graf von Passau und Finningen(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1150년 2월 9일 스위스 아아르가 세언에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Uta von Passau nasceu em 2 de setembro de 1085, em Sulzbach, Ruhstorf an der Rott, Landkreis Passau, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Ulrich Graf von Passau und Finningen, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten. Ela faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1150, em Seon, Aargau, Suiça, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Uta von Passau родилась 2 сентября 1085 г. в местности сулзбач, рухсторф ан дир ротт, ландкрис пассау, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Ulrich Graf von Passau und Finningen было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen, 35. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Engelbert II. Herzog von Kärnten. Она умерла 9 февраля 1150 г. в местности сеон, ааргау, Швейцария в возрасте 64 лет.
